description.en: England's everyday crusty white loaf: an oval hearth loaf with diagonal slashes along the top that split open in the oven. Just flour, yeast, salt and water, baked hot with steam for a thick, deep gold crust.
description.de: Englands alltägliches knuspriges Weißbrot: ein ovales Brot mit diagonalen Einschnitten, die im Ofen aufreißen. Nur Mehl, Hefe, Salz und Wasser, heiß mit Schwaden gebacken für eine dicke, tiefgoldene Kruste.
description.es: El pan blanco crujiente de cada día en Inglaterra: un pan ovalado con cortes diagonales en la parte superior que se abren en el horno. Solo harina, levadura, sal y agua, horneado a alta temperatura con vapor para una corteza gruesa y dorada.
description.fr: Le pain blanc croustillant du quotidien en Angleterre : un pain ovale entaillé en diagonale qui s'ouvre à la cuisson. Rien que de la farine, de la levure, du sel et de l'eau, cuit à four chaud avec buée pour une croûte épaisse et dorée.

origin.note: A high-street bakery staple; the name is generally thought to come from the way the crust 'blooms' open along the slashes as it bakes.

yield.shape: long oval, three or four diagonal slashes on top

keeping.note: Crust is at its best within hours of baking; wrap in paper, not plastic, to keep it from going soft.

method.title: Mix & knead
method.summary: Combine flour, yeast and salt, add water and oil, then knead 8-10 minutes to a smooth, elastic dough.

method.title: Bulk rise
method.summary: Prove in an oiled bowl until doubled, 45 minutes to an hour.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Flatten into a rectangle, fold both short ends into the middle like a letter, turn a quarter turn, flatten again, then roll into a tight cylinder and tuck the ends under.

method.title: Final proof
method.summary: Rest seam-down on a floured tray until puffy, 35-45 minutes.

method.title: Score
method.summary: Cut three or four confident diagonal slashes along the top.

method.title: Bake with steam
method.summary: Bake at high heat with a pan of hot water in the oven base for a burst of steam, until deep golden and hollow-sounding underneath, 30-35 minutes.

source.adaptation: Water given as a range; used the midpoint. Optional poppy seed topping omitted for a plain classic version.
